title: STERIS plc (STE) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: STERIS plc (NYSE:STE ) Q2 2023 Results Conference Call November 10, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Julie Winter - IR Daniel Carestio - President, CEO Michael Tokich - SVP, CFO Conference Call Participants Matthew Mishan - KeyBanc Mike Matson - Needham & Company Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler Jacob Johnson - Stephens Michael Polark - Wolfe Research Dave Turkaly - JMP Securities Operator Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the STERIS plc Second Quarter 2023 Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Please also note, today's event is being recorded.

title: STERIS (STE) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Margins Increase
text: Barring AST, poor reported revenue performance across three of STERIS' (STE) operating segments poses concerns.

title: Steris (STE) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Steris (STE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -0.50% and 1.79%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
